languages.text: "Я благодарен за вести, но ваше вмешательство в это дело заканчивается прямо сейчас. Мы ведем войну, и я не могу позволить изменнику находиться на свободе ни секундой больше". {n}Достав вокс, Себериан командует:{/n} "Немедленно возьмите капитана Зауэрбэка под стражу".

traits.locale_text: "Я благодарен за вести, но ваше вмешательство в это дело заканчивается прямо сейчас. Мы ведем войну, и я не могу позволить изменнику находиться на свободе ни секундой больше". {n}Достав вокс, Себериан командует:{/n} "Немедленно возьмите капитана Зауэрбэка под стражу".

languages.text: "I am grateful for the news, but your interference in this matter ends here. We are at war, and I cannot allow a traitor to be at large a second longer." {n}Drawing out his vox, Seberian commands:{/n} "Take Captain Sauerback into custody immediately."
languages.original_text: "Я благодарен за вести, но ваше вмешательство в это дело заканчивается прямо сейчас. Мы ведем войну, и я не могу позволить изменнику находиться на свободе ни секундой больше". {n}Достав вокс, Себериан командует:{/n} "Немедленно возьмите капитана Зауэрбэка под стражу".

traits.locale_text: "I am grateful for the news, but your interference in this matter ends here. We are at war, and I cannot allow a traitor to be at large a second longer." {n}Drawing out his vox, Seberian commands:{/n} "Take Captain Sauerback into custody immediately."

"I am grateful for the news, but your interference in this matter ends here. We are at war, and I cannot allow a traitor to be at large a second longer." {n}Drawing out his vox, Seberian commands:{/n} "Take Captain Sauerback into custody immediately."

"I am grateful for the news, but your interference in this matter ends here. We are at war, and I cannot allow a traitor to be at large a second longer." {n}Drawing out his vox, Seberian commands:{/n} "Take Captain Sauerback into custody immediately."

languages.text: "Ich danke Euch für die Nachricht, aber hier endet Eure Einmischung in diese Angelegenheit. Wir sind im Krieg, und ich kann nicht zulassen, dass ein Verräter noch länger frei herumläuft." {n}Seberian holt sein Vox hervor und befiehlt:{/n} "Nehmt Captain Sauerback umgehend in Gewahrsam."
languages.original_text: "I am grateful for the news, but your interference in this matter ends here. We are at war, and I cannot allow a traitor to be at large a second longer." {n}Drawing out his vox, Seberian commands:{/n} "Take Captain Sauerback into custody immediately."

traits.locale_text: "Ich danke Euch für die Nachricht, aber hier endet Eure Einmischung in diese Angelegenheit. Wir sind im Krieg, und ich kann nicht zulassen, dass ein Verräter noch länger frei herumläuft. {n}Seberian holt sein Vox hervor und befiehlt:{/n} "Nehmt Captain Sauerback umgehend in Gewahrsam."

languages.text: “感谢你带来的消息，但这件事你不用再插手了。现在是战争时期，我绝不允许叛徒再多逍遥一秒钟。”{n}塞贝里安取出音阵下令道：{/n}“立刻逮捕苏尔贝克上尉。”
languages.original_text: "I am grateful for the news, but your interference in this matter ends here. We are at war, and I cannot allow a traitor to be at large a second longer." {n}Drawing out his vox, Seberian commands:{/n} "Take Captain Sauerback into custody immediately."

traits.locale_text: “感谢你带来的消息，但这件事你不用再插手了。现在是战争时期，我绝不允许叛徒再多逍遥一秒钟。”{n}塞贝里安取出音阵下令道：{/n}“立刻逮捕苏尔贝克上尉。”

languages.text: « Je vous remercie pour vos informations, mais votre mission s'arrête ici. Nous sommes en guerre, et je ne peux laisser un traître en liberté plus longtemps. » {n}Seberian ordonne à travers son vox :{/n} « Procédez à l'arrestation immédiate du capitaine Sauerback. »
languages.original_text: "I am grateful for the news, but your interference in this matter ends here. We are at war, and I cannot allow a traitor to be at large a second longer." {n}Drawing out his vox, Seberian commands:{/n} "Take Captain Sauerback into custody immediately."

traits.locale_text: « Je vous remercie pour vos informations, mais votre mission s'arrête ici. Nous sommes en guerre, et je ne peux laisser un traître en liberté plus longtemps. » {n}Seberian ordonne à travers son vox :{/n} « Procédez à l'arrestation immédiate du capitaine Sauerback. »

languages.text: «Agradezco la noticia, pero su participación en este asunto termina aquí. Estamos en guerra, y no toleraré que un traidor siga libre ni un segundo más». {n}Seberian activa su vocotransmisor y da una orden:{/n} «Arrestad inmediatamente al capitán Sauerback».
languages.original_text: "I am grateful for the news, but your interference in this matter ends here. We are at war, and I cannot allow a traitor to be at large a second longer." {n}Drawing out his vox, Seberian commands:{/n} "Take Captain Sauerback into custody immediately."

traits.locale_text: «Agradezco la noticia, pero su participación en este asunto termina aquí. Estamos en guerra, y no toleraré que un traidor siga libre ni un segundo más». {n}Seberian activa su vocotransmisor y da una orden:{/n} «Arrestad inmediatamente al capitán Sauerback».

languages.text: "Haber için minnettarım ancak bu konuya müdahalen burada sona eriyor. Savaştayız ve bir hainin bir saniye daha serbest kalmasına izin veremem." {n}Seberian, voksunu çıkararak emrediyor.{/n} "Yüzbaşı Sauerback'i derhâl gözaltına alın."
languages.original_text: "I am grateful for the news, but your interference in this matter ends here. We are at war, and I cannot allow a traitor to be at large a second longer." {n}Drawing out his vox, Seberian commands:{/n} "Take Captain Sauerback into custody immediately."

traits.locale_text: "Haber için minnettarım ancak bu konuya müdahalen burada sona eriyor. Savaştayız ve bir hainin bir saniye daha serbest kalmasına izin veremem." {n}Seberian, voksunu çıkararak emrediyor.{/n} "Yüzbaşı Sauerback'i derhâl gözaltına alın."

languages.text: 「この知らせに感謝しますが、この件へのあなたの介入はここで終わりです。私たちは戦争中で、裏切り者をもう1秒も放っておくことはできません。」{n}シベリアはヴォックスを引き出し、命令を下す:{/n}「サウアーバック大佐をすぐに拘束せよ。」
languages.original_text: "I am grateful for the news, but your interference in this matter ends here. We are at war, and I cannot allow a traitor to be at large a second longer." {n}Drawing out his vox, Seberian commands:{/n} "Take Captain Sauerback into custody immediately."

traits.locale_text: 「この知らせに感謝しますが、この件へのあなたの介入はここで終わりです。私たちは戦争中で、裏切り者をもう1秒も放っておくことはできません。」{n}シベリアはヴォックスを引き出し、命令を下す:{/n}「サウアーバック大佐をすぐに拘束せよ。」
